title: oSzoukaua's: Alt-Craft
body:
# Description: Alternative colours/textures for minecraft!

![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/417bd6501374ae1b0cacffc38097220627b0669e_0.webp) ![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c0d0ef35e308cc3840939705a774dd92c1b7980_0.webp) ![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d56b3ea9a17205e772439773f5427f417fb85030.png) ![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c4b971f7dd06dbfdc6105d64d3efe019d7321f9_0.webp)

## Notes:
Client-Side: meaning that it needs to be installed on the Client






## Other:

You are free to use this pack in modpacks/youtube videos and many other forms of sharing


License: ATTRIBUTION-NONCOMMERCIAL-SHAREALIKE 4.0 INTERNATIONAL

If you would like me to port this to any other Minecraft version, i would be more than happy to do so, please contact me! my details are below.

If you do find any issues/have any recommendations, suggestions for **optimizations**, **improvements**, or **new features** to add, feel free to **contact me!**
Discord @oSzoukaua
E-Mail Contact.oSzoukaua+Modrinth@gmail.com
